title: Craft Light Blocks
description: Adds a crafting recipe for light blocks - simple as that :)
body:
# Craft Light Blocks

This project adds a crafting recipe which allows you to craft light blocks, supporting the latest 1.21 versions!

## Crafting Recipe

Surround a torch with 8 glass panes in a crafting table.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/285811dea5ceb0d657126b8a703b86fb9d59b6ce.png)

> The recipe will show up in your recipe book after you craft it for the first time.

## Features

- No configuration needed, just drop it in and play
- Recipe automatically appears in your recipe book after crafting once
- Lightweight and performance-friendly

## Installation
### Datapack 
Works on both singleplayer worlds and servers.

1. Download the datapack .zip file
2. Place it in your world's `/datapacks` folder
   - Singleplayer: `.minecraft/saves/[WorldName]/datapacks`
   - Server: `[ServerFolder]/[WorldName]/datapacks`
3. Run `/reload` ingame or restart your server
4. Check with `/datapack list` to verify.



## Roadmap

- Add support for older versions (1.20.x, 1.19.x, etc.)
- Standalone mod version for Forge/Fabric
- Config file for customizing the recipe!
- Customizing the Light Block brightness via recipe

---
